chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT ORDER SHEET OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA No.D-337 0f 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE UF HEARNG OF HONBLE JUDGE Fur orders uffice objection 2, For orders on MANo 1191/2015, For Katcha Peshi 21.09.2016 For orders on M.A.No.1192/20I5 None is present for the petitioner It appears that this petition was filed 1803 2015, thereafter, Ihe petitioner has IOf pursued Ihe matter diligently.
